mapper.insert: insert into document_comments (document_comment_id, company_id, document_id, parent_comment_id, anchor_block_id, anchor_start, anchor_end, anchor_text, author_user_id, body, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{documentCommentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentCommentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{anchorBlockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{anchorStart,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{anchorEnd,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{anchorText,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{authorUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{body,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update document_comments set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, document_id = #{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_comment_id = #{parentCommentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, anchor_block_id = #{anchorBlockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, anchor_start = #{anchorStart,jdbcType=INTEGER}, anchor_end = #{anchorEnd,jdbcType=INTEGER}, anchor_text = #{anchorText,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, author_user_id = #{authorUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, body = #{body,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where document_comment_id = #{documentCommentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
